channel.title: CalcLeap — Free Online Calculators
channel.description: Free online calculators for finance, tax, insurance, health, and more. Professional-grade tools with visual results.

item.title: Income Tax Calculator 2024
item.description: Calculate federal income tax, see your bracket, effective rate, and take-home pay.

item.title: BMI Calculator
item.description: Calculate Body Mass Index with visual gauge and health recommendations.

item.title: Mortgage Payment Calculator
item.description: Calculate monthly mortgage payments, amortization schedule, and total interest.

item.title: Life Insurance Calculator
item.description: Estimate how much life insurance coverage you need based on income, debts, and dependents.

item.title: Compound Interest Calculator
item.description: See how your money grows with compound interest over time.

item.title: Car Insurance Calculator
item.description: Estimate auto insurance premiums by state, age, vehicle, and coverage level.

item.title: Retirement Calculator
item.description: Plan your retirement savings with projections for 401k, IRA, and Social Security.

item.title: Sleep Calculator
item.description: Find the perfect bedtime based on 90-minute sleep cycles.

item.title: Paycheck Calculator
item.description: Calculate take-home pay after federal and state taxes.

item.title: JSON Formatter
item.description: Format, validate, and beautify JSON data instantly.
